entry.title: When the new SAP Note for RFHUDSP will be available (containing new legal requirement)?
entry.content:
Hi All,

Please kindly advise when the new SAP Note for RFHUDSP will be available (containing new legal requirement)? 

Thank you,

Bozena

entry.title: Email notification is not triggering for payment batch Approval
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are using the S4 Hana Public Edition 

Our client needs one level check in payment approval. So, we configured activity in "Send Email to Payment Batch Approvers" for your information please find the below screenshot.

Configured same as mentioned in below link.

Manage Email Notifications for Payment Batch Approvers | SAP Help Portal

We are not able to generate the email notification, but we are able to see the notification in system user level.
and also, please find the below screenshot we find while configuration

Please let us know, is there any work around for this issue, it will be more helpfull to us.

Thank you in advance.

Best Regards,
Nandini

entry.title: Difference bettween actitivies 01, 10 and 22 for authorization object F_BKPF_BUK
entry.content:
HI, 

Can somebody explain me process wise the difference between the following activities for authorization object F_BKPF_BUK?

  • 01 - Create
  • 10  - Post
  • 22 - Enter, Include Assign

Many thanks

  •

entry.title: Email Notifications are not triggering for Payment Batch Approval Process
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are using the S4 Hana Public Edition 

Our client needs one level check in payment approval. So, we configured activity in "Send Email to Payment Batch Approvers" for your information please find the below screenshot.

Configured same as mentioned in below link.

Manage Email Notifications for Payment Batch Approvers | SAP Help Portal

We are not able to generate the email notification for receiver mail id , but we are able to see the notification in system user level.
and also, please find the below screenshot we find while doing configuration

Please let us know, is there any work around for this issue, it will be more helpful to us.

Thank you in advance.

Best Regards,
Nandini

entry.title: day wise Cleared documents fetching
entry.content:
Hello All,

I would to fetch Vendor cleared documents on Daily basis in R/3 system. say for example if 100 documents are cleared on today then tomorrow I am trying to fetch all the 100 cleared documents based on Clearing documents.

for the purpose i had written logic to fetch Clearing documents first from BKPF based on CPUDT field then passing to BSAK as below.

Now I am facing Performance issue because in BSAK table  AUGGJ and BLART are not key fields and there are no secondary indexes also available. could any one help me to improve the performance ar finding alternative way?

Thank you in Advance.

entry.title: Header text is deleted when I post a currency document
entry.content:
Dear All,

when I post a document with "post general journal entries" app using a transaction currency other than Euro, the system deletes what I write in the header text. Why? 

Can you help me?

Thanks and Kind Regards.

Gloria

entry.title: Askb
entry.content:
hello,

 

Is there any possibility to check if ASKB was run in real mode if nothing was posted? How i can check if each month ASKB was run if no postings were created?

Many thanks,

Denisa

entry.title: How to control pre-defined asset class
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Hello.

I would like to know about pre-defined standard asset class.

How can I control that users cannot use standard asset classes?

I understand that it is not possible to change the pre-defined standard asset class.

I don't want users to use the standard asset classes, any suggestions?

 

Best Regards,

Nozomu

entry.title: is person responsible field is required for WBS synchronization
entry.content: is person responsible field is  required for WBS synchronization for transferring WBS  from SAP to Eproc ??

entry.title: why unassigned GL accounts are showing in Financial statements report under transaction code-F.01
entry.content: I have created new FSVs to split two different statement like balance sheet statement & P & L statement seperately, when i execute F.01 transaction, its showing revenue gl accounts and expenses accounts in Balance sheet statement? I make sure that i never assigned these GL accounts in my FSV (balance sheet statement). From where these gl are coming in F.01 screen? i am confusing where is the issue? what is the reason to show these gl in balance sheet account.

entry.title: Which SAP Module to Choose?
entry.content: Hi, I am new to the SAP ecosystem and would like guidance on which module to focus on as a functional consultant. I have a background in industrial engineering and am considering various options. Given the high demand for SAP FICO consultants, I am wondering if that would be the best choice. Any advice would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: How can I extract the reference number from the <Ustrd> tag in an EBS file?
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

I have a question regarding the <Ustrd> tag. When reading an EBS file, the reference number is typically found within this tag. However, there is also additional text next to the reference number that is not needed for my use case. How can I extract only the reference number from this tag?

Is there a method to parse the content of the <Ustrd> tag and retrieve just the reference number, excluding the other text? Any advice on how to achieve this would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Handling Overflow of Characters in <Ustrd> Tag During EBS File Processing
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

I have a question regarding the processing of EBS files using program FF_5. In the case of the <Ustrd> tag, which typically holds reference information, the tag is limited to 140 characters. However, if the content exceeds this limit and contains more than 140 characters, I would like to know how SAP handles this scenario.

  • Does SAP FF_5 read only the first 140 characters and ignore the rest, or is there any way for SAP to process the additional characters?
  • If SAP does ignore the additional characters, what happens to them? Are they lost, or is there any functionality in place to capture the overflow (for example, moving the extra text to another field or row)?

Any insights or recommendations for handling this situation would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Account customer reconciliation XXXX in company code XXXX cannot be directly posted to
entry.content:
Dear Expert 

 

wile doing the transaction from Reconciliation account  we are facing this issue 

Reconciliation DR

Normal Account CR

i have check in FS00 there in no tick mark in automatic posting only still i am facing this issue .

Regards 

Ajay

entry.title: How does depreciation calculation in Asset Accounting differ between SAP ECC 6.0 EHP6/7 and S/4?
entry.content:
Dear SAP Experts in Asset Accounting within Financial Accounting,

In the relevant literature, it is recommended to activate the new FI-AA directly when implementing Asset Accounting in SAP for the first time. This not only provides an extended range of functionalities but also reduces the effort required for the future migration to S/4HANA. While certain activities are still necessary during the migration, their scope is significantly smaller if the new Asset Accounting has already been used in SAP ECC.

The advantages of the new Asset Accounting can be summarized as follows:

  • Real-time postings: All depreciation areas are updated in real time.
  • Flexible leading valuation: There is no hierarchical dependency— all depreciation areas are now treated equally.
  • Parallel document creation: Separate documents are posted for each valuation, ensuring correct values from the outset.
  • Simplified valuation plan: The structure and handling of valuations have been optimized.
  • New transaction for valuation-specific postings: This allows targeted restrictions to a specific ledger group or depreciation area.
  • Elimination of delta depreciation areas: Parallel valuation is now performed without the need for separate delta depreciation areas.
  • No restriction of transaction types to depreciation areas: Transaction types can now be used flexibly across all depreciation areas.
  • Different fiscal year variants per valuation: Only the start and end dates of the fiscal year must match.
  • Simplified handling of different accounting principles: Assets can be capitalized according to one accounting principle while being expensed under another.

 

I am interested in the differences in depreciation processing across the three systems: SAP ECC 6.0 up to EHP6, SAP ECC 6.0 EHP7 and later, and SAP S/4HANA.

I have noticed that in transaction AFAB, the reason for the posting run (Planned posting run, Repeat, Restart, Unplanned posting run) is missing in SAP S/4HANA.

Thank you for your support.

Best regards,
Emal Rahman

entry.title: Canada tax procedure
entry.content:
Hi, 

There is a requirement where company code for europe and Canada would be same. And company code belongs to UAE for tax saving purpose.

Now the issue is if company code belongs to UAE then conditions type of tax for Canada like JRC1 JRC2 ect is not getting triggered because system can't read TAXCAJ ( with Jurisdiction code) tax procedure where Tax condition type got assigned, also these conditions are maintained in FTXP with tax code and also  conditions record will get upated in FV11.

These conditions type should work for different company code , so to achieve this could you please help me to get solution?

entry.title: No direct postings can be made to G/L acct. 50000020 in CoCode 3000 When creating A PO
entry.content:
Hello Gurus,

There is a issue when creating a PO ''No direct postings can be made to G/L acct. 50000020 in CoCode 3000''. I am going to create a Material PO and in account assignment tab the G/L is get as Consumption -Spares A/c. 

A Screenshot is attached FYR. 

Any sustainable solution can provide to create the PO without this issue.

entry.title: Which interpretation algorithm is used to extract the reference from FEBRE-VWEZW to FEBCL-SELVON?
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

I have a question regarding the Electronic Bank Statement (EBS) process. When the content from the <ustrd> tag in XML file ( format is CAMT.035 ) is populated into the VWEZW (Note to Payee) field in the FEBRE table, how is the reference then extracted into the SELVON field in the FEBCL table? I’ve seen on forums that interpretation algorithms are used for this. Is there a standard SAP interpretation algorithm for this, or how is the process typically handled?

Thank you in advance for your help!

entry.title: How To Enable Export > Spreadsheet in S_ALR_87012277
entry.content: How To Enable Export > Spreadsheet in S_ALR_87012277

entry.title: Request for Solution – Assigning Assets to Employees in SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear SAP Team,

I am implementing FI-AA for a client based in Dubai on SAP Public Cloud. As part of their requirement, they need to assign assets to employees and track which asset is assigned to which employee.

In SAP Private Cloud, this is typically achieved using the "Personnel number" field in the asset master data. However, in SAP Public Cloud, we could not find a similar field to maintain the employee assignment at the asset master level.

Could you please advise on the standard approach or any available alternative solution in SAP Public Cloud to fulfill this requirement?

Looking forward to your guidance.

Best regards,
Syed Ahsan
